title.en: The reduction of the quota is not good news for...

content.en:
The reduction of the quota is not good news for these Great Ancestors!

No Great Ancestor didn't want to leave the Hopeless Land, after all, only by leaving could he hope to become a high-level immeasurable lifeform!

Those primary-level immeasurable lifeforms were too far away from the higher-order immeasurable lifeforms to have little thought about leaving the hopeless land.

However, they themselves were already mid-level immeasurable lifeforms, and they were naturally eager to break through.

Even if he has become a mid-level immeasurable lifeform, he is also a top-notch combat power in the hopeless land, and even if he doesn't cultivate, he can live a good life.

But when something happens, they're dead.

Therefore, if they can break through, they naturally want to break through.

"Places?"

Ye Tian looked confused, and he didn't know much about leaving the place in the Hopeless Land.

But soon, with the narration of the Golden Glass Great Ancestor, Ye Tian gradually understood the situation.

The reason why the Hopeless Land is separated from the rest of the Genki Territory is not man-made, but natural environmental factors.

Beyond the hopeless land is the Voidless Galaxy, and only high-level immeasurable lifeforms can hope to survive the Voidless Galaxy, but even so, there are still many preparations, otherwise high-level immeasurable lifeforms may fall into the Voidless Galaxy.

The Voidless Galaxy prohibits time and space shuttle, and also prohibits flight, and once you enter the Voidless Galaxy, you will be forcibly pulled into the depths of the Voidless Galaxy.

There are many ferocious creatures living in the Voidless Galaxy, and the strength of these creatures is not very strong, but due to the large number of them, coupled with the natural adaptation to the environment of the Voidless Galaxy, they can exert their full strength.

Therefore, even if a mid-level immeasurable lifeform dares to cross the Voidless Galaxy alone, it is almost certain to die.

Of course, the biggest threat is not these creatures, but the overlords of the Voidless Galaxy.

The strength of these overlords is very strong, and even high-level immeasurable lifeforms can be easily hit or even killed by these overlords.

If you encounter the overlord in the empty galaxy, it will definitely be a disaster.

Because of this, these mid-level immeasurable lifeforms did not dare to leave the Hopeless Land to cross the Voidless Galaxy.

And beyond the Hopeless Lands, there is a force that has subdued a creature from the Voidless Galaxy, the Silver Lin Kun!

The strength of this Silver Lin Kun is only comparable to that of a top-notch mid-level immeasurable lifeform, but it can intimidate most of the creatures in the Voidless Galaxy.

In addition, there are high-level immeasurable lifeforms in charge, so they dare to cross the voidless galaxy.

Of course, that force also came to the hopeless land for the benefit of resources, and it was impossible to come here for no reason.

The Hopeless Land is rich in a very scarce resource outside the Hopeless Land—Heterosilver Sand!

This kind of resource is one of the materials that the force has vigorously acquired, and if you have 10,000 catties of different silver sand, you can get a chance to carry the silver linkun.

But that force won't take away too many middle-level immeasurable lifeforms every time, because Yinlin Kun can't take away too many middle-level immeasurable lifeforms, otherwise Yinlin Kun won't be able to cover it up, and it will be sensed by those overlords.

There was once an accident that caused a silver linkun to be killed, and other middle-level immeasurable lifeforms fell, and even the high-level immeasurable lifeforms in the town were severely damaged.

Since then, the force has only given a fixed number of seats.

For example, last time, the quota was one hundred mid-level immeasurable lifeforms!

The maximum number of 100 mid-level immeasurable lifeforms that collect the Heterosilver Sand can obtain a quota, so these mid-level immeasurable lifeforms have been working hard to collect the Heterosilver Sand for all these years.

If there is a treasure land that breeds different silver sand, it will definitely be snatched and killed by these middle-level immeasurable lifeforms.

"Strange Silver Sand!"

Ye Tian didn't have any foreign silver sand in his hands, and he didn't know where there was different silver sand, but he felt that it should be very simple for him to leave the hopeless land.

......

"How many places are there this time?"

A mid-level immeasurable lifeform asked.

Of the middle-level immeasurable lifeforms present, only the Golden Glass Great Ancestor participated in the meeting on behalf of the True Mountain Leader, so now only the Golden Glass Great Ancestor knows the specific quota.

"Fifty places!"

Jinli Ancestor said.

"It's only fifty places, and the competition is too fierce!"

Many Great Ancestors were secretly surprised.

From 100 to 50 at once, that's half less!

Although hundreds of territories are vying for such a small quota, the Great Ancestor of their True Mountain Territory itself has little hope, and it can even be said that they will get benefits this time.

After all, as the day of departure was approaching, many promising mid-level immeasurable life forms would do whatever it took to acquire the foreign silver sand in the hands of other Great Ancestors.

Therefore, the smaller the number of places, the more fierce the competition, which also means that the purchase price of Yiyinsha will be very high.

It seems that they can sell Yiyinsha for a higher price, but they don't want to see it, after all, they want to leave the hopeless land, not make money.

Moreover, the price of Yiyinsha has really been speculated, which will not be beneficial to them in the future, and they also need to pay more to buy Yiyinsha.

Unless it was those Great Ancestors who never wanted to leave, they would be happy to see this situation.

At this time, the Golden Glass Ancestor said again: "According to the news from that force, it is because Yinlin Kun has been injured, so in order to ensure safety, the quota must be reduced!"

"So, if Yinlin Kun recovers from his injuries, the quota will be restored in the future, is that true?"

A mid-level immeasurable lifeform said.

The Golden Glass Ancestor shook his head and said, "I don't know, in fact, it's not just this reason, but that force also seems to have found the Alien Silver Sand in other places, so the value of our hopeless land has been greatly reduced." What I'm worried about is that if there is an accident this time that leads to the death of Yinlin Kun, I am afraid that there will be no quota for a long time!"

"Forget it, let's not fight for the quota this time, it's too dangerous, if something happens and it falls, it will be dangerous!" Some Great Ancestors said.

However, the Golden Glass Ancestor still wanted to go out, after all, he couldn't make any progress here, so he wanted to leave the hopeless land.

Subsequently, these Great Ancestors began to discuss the matter of the transaction of the different silver sand.

Ye Tian didn't have a different silver sand, so naturally he couldn't participate in such a topic.

"Golden Glass Great Ancestor, what is the force that controls Yinlin Kun?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

The Golden Glass Great Ancestor did not hide it, and directly revealed: "It is the Xuanqi Pavilion, and it is also one of the oldest forces in the Xuanqi Territory, although this era has declined, but it is still in the overlord power in the entire Xuanqi Territory! However, the Xuanqi Pavilion is very strict in recruiting the Great Ancestor, and only accepts the Great Ancestor of the Xuan Clan, the Wing Dragon Clan, and the Heavenly Ancestor Clan. "

Ye Tian nodded, indicating that he knew!
